title: geranium transbaicalicum subsp. turczaninovii
intro: Geranium transbaicalicum subsp. turczaninovii, also known as the Transbaikal geranium, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Geranium. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of geraniol, which has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Geranium transbaicalicum subsp. turczaninovii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and digestive problems.
